evidence: We and our third-party vendors, clients or counterparties develop, deploy and incorporate AI technology in certain business processes, services and products.

Models may be used in processes such as determining the pricing of various products, grading loans and extending credit...preventing fraud, strengthening customer authentication processes, generating marketing analytics
